module1  
develop an intricate python subroutine utilizing opencv and pillow libraries to carry out rigorous preprocessing of image data in preparation for a computer vision task, the latter being handled by a preexisting model trained on tensorflow, an advanced machine learning platform.  

module2  
the subroutine must include steps for image resizing, normalization, color adjustment, and noise reduction to ensure consistency and quality across input images.  

module3  
it must also incorporate data augmentation techniques such as flipping, rotating, and cropping to enhance the model's generalization capabilities.  

module4  
the preprocessing should be structured to handle multiple image formats and resolutions, ensuring compatibility with the tensorflow model while maintaining computational efficiency.
